# PERF-206 positive: sqlx.Unsafe with a runtime-built query name
lang: go
file: PERF-206-vulnerable.go
variant: framework
---
package sample

import (
	"fmt"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Order struct {
	ID uint
}

func Load(db *gorm.DB, table string, id uint) error {
	name := fmt.Sprintf("%s.idx", table)
	db.Unsafe().Where(name+" = ?", id).First(&Order{})
	return nil
}
